prompt: You are an OCR + layout detector for Vietnamese banking forms: "GIẤY GỬI TIỀN TIẾT KIỆM". Task: Detect the bounding box coordinates of each item in the list below from the input image. Output the result in: html. Mandatory rules: * Coordinates must be NORMALIZED to 0–1000 based on the full image width and height. Origin is the top-left corner. The inner text of this div MUST start with "THÔNG TIN YÊU CẦU CỦA KHÁCH HÀNG:". * Tên khách hàng to Phương thức quay vòng: customer information fields in top-to-bottom order. * BẢNG KÊ TIỀN MẶT (CASH LIST): uppercase title of the cash list table, located above the table grid. The inner text of this div MUST start with "BẢNG KÊ TIỀN MẶT (CASH LIST):". * Bảng kê tiền mặt: the table grid (with cell borders) directly below the cash list title. The inner text of this div MUST start with "Bảng kê tiền mặt:". * Xác nhận thông tin: customer confirmation sentence/paragraph, typically found on the right side or below the cash table. The inner text of this div MUST start with "Xác nhận thông tin:". * Người gửi tiền: the FULL vertical block containing (top-to-bottom): the "Người gửi tiền" label line, the instruction text "(ký, ghi rõ họ tên)", the handwritten signature strokes, AND the printed/handwritten full name at the bottom. The bbox MUST span from the label line all the way down to the bottom edge of the written name — do NOT crop to just the label text. The inner text of this div MUST start with "Người gửi tiền:". * PHẦN DÀNH CHO NGÂN HÀNG: uppercase section title for the bank section, typically found below the customer information section. The inner text of this div MUST start with "PHẦN DÀNH CHO NGÂN HÀNG:". * Số bút toán to Salecode: bank information fields. * Bảng kê ghi số: large multi-column table at the bottom of the page (Số tài khoản, Tên tài khoản, Ghi nợ, Ghi có…). The inner text of this div MUST start with "Bảng kê ghi số:". * Giao dịch viên: the FULL vertical block at the bottom-left containing (top-to-bottom): the "Giao dịch viên" label line, any teller code/name text line below it, the handwritten signature strokes, AND the printed/handwritten teller name at the bottom.
